final:
module timer_8bit(  
    input clk,  
    input rst,  
    input en,  
    output reg [7:0] count  
);  
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin  
        if (rst) begin  
            count <= 8'b0;  
        end else if (en) begin  
            count <= (count == 8'b11111111) ? 8'b0 : count + 1;  
        end  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
